mapper.select: SELECT bd.material_id AS materialId, -- 자재 ID m.material_name AS materialName, -- 자재명(표시용) m.unit AS unit, -- 기본 단위(kg, EA 등) SUM(bd.qty * #{orderQty}) AS gross_req -- 총소요량 = (BOM 수량 × 주문수량) FROM bom_master bm JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_id = bm.bom_id LEFT JOIN material m ON m.material_id = bd.material_id WHERE bm.product_id = #{productId} AND bm.status = 'ACTIVE' -- 활성 BOM만 전개 GROUP BY bd.material_id, m.material_name, m.unit ORDER BY materialId

SELECT g.materialId AS materialId, -- 자재ID m.material_name AS materialName, -- 자재명(표시용) m.unit AS unit, -- 단위 g.gross_req AS gross_req, -- 총소요 IFNULL(inv.on_hand, 0) AS on_hand, -- 재고합계 IFNULL(rsv.reserved, 0) AS reserved, -- 예약합계 (IFNULL(inv.on_hand, 0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved, 0)) AS available, -- 가용 GREATEST(g.gross_req - (IFNULL(inv.on_hand,0) - IFNULL(rsv.reserved,0)), 0) AS net_req -- 순소요(최소 0) FROM ( /* 1) BOM 전개 → 총소요 */ SELECT bd.material_id AS materialId, SUM(bd.qty * #{orderQty}) AS gross_req FROM bom_master bm JOIN bom_detail bd ON bd.bom_id = bm.bom_id WHERE bm.product_id = #{productId} AND bm.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY bd.material_id ) g /* 2) 자재 마스터(표시용 정보) */ LEFT JOIN material m ON m.material_id = g.materialId /* 3) 재고합계(on_hand): LOT/창고 행을 자재별로 집계 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(quantity) AS on_hand FROM material_inventory GROUP BY material_id ) inv ON inv.material_id = g.materialId /* 4) 예약합계(reserved): WO×자재 예약을 자재별로 집계 */ LEFT JOIN ( SELECT material_id, SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved FROM material_reservation GROUP BY material_id ) rsv ON rsv.material_id = g.materialId ORDER BY net_req DESC, materialId
